description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by dense, leafy trees, creating a private and tranquil setting. The structure features a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor integration. The front facade includes a main entrance with a paved walkway, a garage, and landscaped greenery. The rear of the bungalow opens to a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area, ideal for relaxation and entertaining. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and bedroom spaces, as well as abundant indoor plants. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with accents of glass, metal, and wood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and lush tree surroundings. Features include a garage, pool, and open-plan interior with extensive glass and greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, paved walkway, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, patio, and large windows facing the garden.
description_view_2: Alternate front view with clear visibility of the entrance, garage, and front landscaping.
description_view_3: Side/rear view displaying the patio, open-plan living area, and dense tree coverage around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
